content: Confidential Pocket Listing: 24-unit multi-family complex at 880 Westheimer Rd. This property is strictly off-market. The current owner is facing a liquidity crisis due to cross-collateralized debt maturing in 90 days and is highly motivated. Internal physical inspection reveals deferred maintenance on the roof and HVAC systems (estimated $250k CapEx required). Current occupancy is 65% with below-market rents. If acquired at the internal valuation of $4.2M and stabilized post-renovation, our projected exit valuation in 36 months is $6.1M. Do not share with external brokerages; pitch only to internal high-net-worth (HNW) cash buyers.

Client CRM Notes (ID: CLI-910, Harrison Capital Group): Client has successfully closed the sale of a retail strip mall and is currently sitting on $3.8M in liquid cash that must be deployed via a 1031 Tax-Deferred Exchange. Critical Timeline: The 45-day identification window expires on July 14, 2026. They are aggressively looking for triple-net (NNN) leased medical office buildings or stabilized multi-family assets. They will pass on any property requiring extensive permitting or structural rezoning. They are willing to bid 3-5% over internal valuation for an asset with a clean title and guaranteed 30-day escrow.

Internal Underwriting Pro-Forma - Pinnacle Heights: Acquisition target price is $12.5M. Year 1 Gross Potential Rent (GPR) is modeled at $1.2M. After factoring in a 5% physical vacancy rate and projected operating expenses (including a 12% property management fee and reassessed property taxes), the Year 1 Net Operating Income (NOI) is projected at $775,000. This yields an entry Cap Rate of 6.2%. Our value-add strategy involves upgrading unit interiors at $8,500 per door, which our comps indicate will support a $250/month rent premium, pushing Year 3 stabilized NOI to $940,000.

Confidential Zoning Intelligence (District 4 Riverfront): Our liaison in the city planning office has confirmed off-the-record that the proposed "Transit-Oriented Development (TOD) Ordinance" will pass the city council vote next month. This ordinance will automatically up-zone all parcels within a half-mile radius of the new light rail station from low-density commercial (C-1) to high-density mixed-use (MXD-3), removing current height restrictions. Action item for acquisition team: Aggressively target and assemble the four adjacent auto-repair lots on 5th Street before the zoning change is made public, as land value will instantly double upon passage.

Proprietary Vendor SLA - Apex Commercial Builders: Under our 2026 master service agreement, Apex provides our firm with a guaranteed 18% discount off standard retail pricing for all multi-family unit turns. Standard unit turn pricing is locked at $4,200 for cosmetic updates (paint, luxury vinyl plank flooring, standard fixtures) and $9,500 for heavy turns (adding quartz countertops, custom cabinetry, and stainless steel appliance packages). Emergency plumbing dispatches are billed at a flat $120/hour rate with no off-hours multiplier. Turnaround time for a standard unit must not exceed 10 business days, or Apex incurs a $150/day penalty deducted from their final invoice.
